classes.label: Cloud safe
classes.description: Safe for frontier planning, review, or execution according to workload policy.

classes.label: Private but cloud allowed
classes.description: Private material that may use cloud only when policy and data-boundary rules allow it.

classes.label: Hybrid abstractable
classes.description: Cloud may see an abstracted plan; raw sensitive content stays local.

classes.label: Refusal sensitive
classes.description: Likely provider-refused or fragile content that should stay on the sovereign lane.

classes.label: Sovereign only
classes.description: Never leaves the local cluster because of privacy, refusal risk, or explicit-content rules.
